events.content: "Evidence": "Copilot CLI session, no Serena MCP server available. Functional equivalent: .serena/memories/ accessed via filesystem grep + view (e.g., implementation-007-pr1989-recursive-failure-learnings.md cited in PRD \u00a71)."

"Evidence": "Read: .serena/memories/implementation/implementation-007-pr1989-recursive-failure-learnings.md (cited in PRD \u00a71, \u00a710); searched .serena/memories/ for agent-vs-skill discriminator and consolidation context (matched 10 files; 5 cited in PRD Prior Art)."

"Evidence": "markdownlint-cli2 runs via pre-commit hook on every commit; spec markdown files in .agents/specs/ are excluded from lint per .markdownlint-cli2.yaml ignore patterns; no markdown lint errors raised on this commit."

"outcome": "Pre-commit failed twice: dash-prohibition (em-dash and en-dash present in PRD \u00a71, \u00a73.1 and REQ-011 dependencies list), session-log requirement. Fixed dashes via Python replace then space-comma cleanup; created this session log; commit succeeds."
"Spec-schemas.md enum drift is exactly the failure mode this audit addresses; reading the schema before writing REQ/DESIGN/TASK frontmatter is the defense.",

lessons: "step": "Round 3: address 3 follow-up review threads (roadmap c1 miss, em-dash in own correction, episode lessons empty)",

"outcome": "Fixed: (a) roadmap re-scored c1=Yes (descriptive Task form in review.md:32 missed by original literal grep); verdict changed from keep-as-agent to skill; counts shifted from 7+2+14 to 8+2+13; load-budget savings 42% -> 47%; (b) em-dash in session log learnings replaced with comma per universal.md MUST NOT rule 5 (ironic violation noted); (c) episode lessons array populated from session log learnings; (d) audit doc regenerated with descriptive-form c1 method + roadmap row + new isolation note section."
